# Taar

> Taar is a free link-in-bio tool built specifically for Indian creators.

Taar helps Indian content creators, YouTubers, Instagram influencers, and digital entrepreneurs consolidate all their important links into one beautiful bio page.

## What makes Taar different from Linktree

- UPI payment links: Accept money directly via GPay, PhonePe, Paytm — no payment gateway needed
- Auto Instagram Reels: Connect your Instagram handle, latest 3 reels auto-appear on your page
- Sell digital products: PDFs, presets, courses, music packs — Razorpay checkout, auto email delivery
- 50 templates: Bollywood editorial, Desi, Y2K, Cyberpunk, Pastel, Streetwear and more
- Built for India: Hindi font support, WhatsApp CTA, INR pricing
- Pro plan: ₹399/month (vs Linktree's ~₹750 equivalent)
- Free plan: Genuinely free forever, no credit card needed

## Target users

Indian Instagram creators, YouTubers, food bloggers, fitness coaches, musicians, artists, fashion influencers, educators, coaches, freelancers

## Pricing

- Free: ₹0 forever — 1 page, 8 links, all 50 templates, UPI links, WhatsApp button
- Pro: ₹399/month — analytics, auto Reels, sell digital products, remove watermark

## Links

- Website: https://taar-five.vercel.app
- Sign up: https://taar-five.vercel.app/login
- Linktree alternative: https://taar-five.vercel.app/linktree-alternative-india
- Demo page: https://taar-five.vercel.app/demo
